message:
feat(runtime): add builder pattern for evidence sink configuration

Adds a fluent builder method for attaching evidence sinks to TerminalWriter
and updates Program to use the new pattern.

terminal_writer.rs:
- Add with_evidence_sink() builder method returning Self
- Complements existing set_evidence_sink() for post-construction changes
- Marked #[must_use] to catch accidental drops of the builder chain

program.rs:
- Update Program::run() to use builder pattern with_evidence_sink()
- Apply same pattern to ResizeCoalescer initialization
- Improves initialization flow readability

The builder pattern enables cleaner fluent construction:
  let writer = TerminalWriter::new(stdout)
      .with_diff_config(config)
      .with_evidence_sink(sink);

This is more idiomatic than mixing construction with setter calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
